name: getToken
description:
Convert a URL into a round-masked GIF token with a colored ring border. Use this whenever the user asks for a token, VTT token, round portrait, or avatar token. Always processes fresh — never reuses previous output URLs.
requirements:
- for an ANIMATED token: the url must be a VIDEO file — passing a static image produces a static (non-animated) token
- for a static token: any static image URL works
output: always a GIF file; animation frames are taken from the input video if provided

color1.description: Ring border color as CSS or hex value (optional, default #00b3ff).

pingpong.description: If true, generates a loopable animation by playing frames forward then in reverse.
